title: Altria Group 2025 Annual Report
note: Primary annual filing for Altria's business mix, risks, segment discussion, and smoke-free strategy.

title: Altria Reports 2025 Fourth-Quarter and Full-Year Results; Provides 2026 Earnings Guidance
note: Investor release supporting 2025 revenue, operating income, segment performance, and guidance context.

title: Altria Group (MO) Market Capitalization
note: Market-cap source for the registry snapshot, showing Altria at about $123.40 billion as of May 22, 2026.

title: Altria Group Market Cap and Statistics
note: Secondary market-data source used for market capitalization, trailing net income context, and approximate P/E calculation.

title: Notes from the Field: Tobacco Product Use Among Adults — United States, 2017–2023
publisher: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
note: Public-health source documenting long-term adult cigarette smoking decline and the continuing burden of tobacco use.

title: Nicotine Pouch Products Authorized by the FDA
note: Regulatory source for FDA-authorized nicotine pouch products, including on! products.

title: on! PLUS Expands Nationwide Retail Availability
note: Company release describing on! PLUS as a Helix Innovations oral nicotine pouch product and noting FDA authorization and nationwide retail expansion.

title: Marlboro Official Product Site
note: Official consumer product site for Marlboro in the United States.

title: on! Nicotine Official Product Site
note: Official consumer product site for on! oral nicotine pouches.

title: QuitSmoke Open-Source Quit-Smoking App
note: Open-source quit-smoking app used as a plausible free-software alternative for cessation support rather than nicotine-product replication.
